about.title: About Next IT Myanmar
about.description: We're pioneering the future of IT in Myanmar. As one of the region's leading IT consulting firms, we bridge the gap between cutting-edge technology and real-world business solutions.
about.whereDescription: We are serving in Myanmar, Thailand and Malaysia

vision.title: Vision and Mission
vision.description: NIM က စီးပွါးရေးလုပ်ငန်းများအတွက် အိုင်တီဆန်းသစ်မှုတွေ ယူလာပေးဖို့ အသင့်ရှိနေပြီ။ ဘာတွေများ စောင့်နေသေးလဲ။ ကဲ၊အတူတူ အံ့ဖွယ်တစ်ခုကို တည်ဆောက်ကြရအောင်!

website.title: Creating a Website
website.subtitle: Want to know how we build a website?

consultation.title: 1. Initial Consultation
consultation.description: Understanding your idea and discussing the type of website you need.

content.title: 2. Content Gathering
content.description: Collecting photos, text, and logos to ensure everything is in place.

design.title: 3. Design & Development
design.description: Transforming your idea into a modern, functional website.

revisions.title: 4. Revisions & Feedback
revisions.description: Refining the design based on your input and finalizing the details.

launch.title: 5. Final Launch
launch.description: Deploying your website and celebrating its successful launch.
